Notice Of Motion And Motion To Vacate Notice Of Settlement Under C.C.P. 664.6 & Enter Judgment Pursuant To Stipulation
Off Calendar Apr-06-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A.'S MOTION TO VACATE NOTICE OF SETTLEMENT UNDER CCP 664.6 & ENTER JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO STIPULATION

No appearances. The court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: The unopposed motion for entry of judgment pursuant to settlement is granted. The court does not have the proposed judgment plaintiff lodged. Plaintiff is entitled to judgment in the amount of $3600 plus costs of $300. Prevailing party to submit a proposed order and a proposed judgment. Judge: Christine Van Aken, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported

Appearances via Zoom Conference

Matter was not contested. not argued. Counsel advises the Court that parties have reached a tentative settlement agreement and seeks a 60 day continuance of this matter. Court denies this request.
